certification_label: M5 Companion Lane Certification On Every Marketed Profile

lane_certifications.scope_summary: Browser/mobile companion notifications, read-only with no editor authority, certified across the relay-reachable profiles

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Source events, review records, session state, and edits are authored and stored by the local core and stay usable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the local_solo profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Paired companion delivery and any relayed action require the companion relay and an active host; the local core never depends on them.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Source events, review records, session state, and edits are authored and stored by the local core and stay usable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the team_managed profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Paired companion delivery and any relayed action require the companion relay and an active host; the local core never depends on them.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Source events, review records, session state, and edits are authored and stored by the local core and stay usable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the enterprise_managed profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Paired companion delivery and any relayed action require the companion relay and an active host; the local core never depends on them.

locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the browser_companion profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Paired companion delivery and any relayed action require the companion relay and an active host; the local core never depends on them.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Source events, review records, session state, and edits are authored and stored by the local core and stay usable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the mobile_companion profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Paired companion delivery and any relayed action require the companion relay and an active host; the local core never depends on them.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work stays on the device and fully usable on this profile.
locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the air_gapped_offline profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile cannot reach a companion relay, so the relay-bound companion lane is not marketed here.

downgrade_rules.rationale: Stale proof narrows the certified claim one step rather than hiding the lane
An unavailable companion relay narrows the lane
Companion scope expanding beyond its narrow boundary narrows the lane

lane_certifications.scope_summary: Attributable, local-first incident workspaces certified on every marketed profile including air-gapped

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Incident evidence, missing-span facts, and runbook records are local-first and inspectable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the local_solo profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Escalation to a managed support channel requires admin continuity; local triage never depends on it.

locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Escalation to a managed support channel requires admin continuity; local triage never depends on it.

downgrade_rules.rationale: Stale proof narrows the certified claim one step rather than hiding the lane
An incident packet that lost attribution narrows the lane

lane_certifications.scope_summary: Inspectable managed sync with conflict review, certified only on profiles that provide a managed plane

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work stays on the device and fully usable on this profile.
locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the local_solo profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile provides no managed control plane, so the managed lane is not marketed here.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: The local core is the source of truth; every synced record stays inspectable and reconcilable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the team_managed profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Server-side sync and conflict relay require the sync provider and, for managed tenants, admin continuity.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: The local core is the source of truth; every synced record stays inspectable and reconcilable offline.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the enterprise_managed profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Server-side sync and conflict relay require the sync provider and, for managed tenants, admin continuity.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work stays on the device and fully usable on this profile.
locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the browser_companion profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile provides no managed control plane, so the managed lane is not marketed here.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work stays on the device and fully usable on this profile.
locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the mobile_companion profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile provides no managed control plane, so the managed lane is not marketed here.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work stays on the device and fully usable on this profile.
locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the air_gapped_offline profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile provides no managed control plane, so the managed lane is not marketed here.

downgrade_rules.rationale: Stale proof narrows the certified claim one step rather than hiding the lane
Sync that cannot be inspected or reconciled narrows the claim
Unavailable admin continuity narrows the managed claim

locality_disclosure.staged: Not marketed on the local_solo profile.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: This profile provides no managed control plane, so the managed lane is not marketed here.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: Local-only artifacts never leave the device and carry no residency dependency.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the team_managed profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Customer-managed-key and region-residency guarantees require the managed key authority and admin continuity, and are claimed only when verifiable.

An unverifiable residency or E2EE claim narrows the lane

lane_certifications.scope_summary: Offboarding that never strands user-owned local work, certified on every marketed profile including air-gapped

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work and history remain on the device and fully usable after offboarding.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the local_solo profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Revoking managed or cloud artifacts requires admin continuity; local-core continuity is never gated on it.

locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the browser_companion profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Revoking managed or cloud artifacts requires admin continuity; local-core continuity is never gated on it.

locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Revoking managed or cloud artifacts requires admin continuity; local-core continuity is never gated on it.

locality_disclosure.stays_local: User-owned local work and history remain on the device and fully usable after offboarding.
locality_disclosure.staged: Certified on the air_gapped_offline profile; cross-profile rollout is staged per cohort and capability.
locality_disclosure.requires_provider_or_admin_continuity: Revoking managed or cloud artifacts requires admin continuity; local-core continuity is never gated on it.

downgrade_rules.rationale: Stale proof narrows the certified claim one step rather than hiding the lane
Offboarding that would strand local work holds the lane
